raw_consumer_statement: I was a victim of fraud by scammers in XXXX XXXX and I sent proof of the fraud to AMEX. The scammers charged my AMEX card for goods I NEVER RECEIVED and showed AMEX proof of this fraud. AMEX accepted fraudulent receipts from the scammers and would not remove the charges. I asked AMEX for the contact information of the scammers and they refused to give it to me. I wanted to find the scammers and put them in jail but AMEX refused to give me their address, phone, email, etc. The scammers have fraudulently charged my AMEX account {$23000.00} and AMEX just charged me {$530.00} interest for this last billing cycle.
